_instructions: Add your open trades to the 'positions' list below.
The tracker runs every 15 min and will manage trailing stops automatically.
When a stop hits, Telegram pings you, you sell in your broker, then delete that entry.
Fields: ticker, shares, entry_price, entry_date (YYYY-MM-DD), initial_stop, notes (optional).

positions.notes: Late entry on day-6 of streak. Hit +10% on 2026-05-14, stop raised to breakeven ($28.80) at broker. Original stop was $26.84.
Oversized entry by mistake (intended 7, bought 35). Risk to stop ~11% of account. Decision pending on whether to trim.
